inputs.titre: Début du système de ségrégation Aborigènes (Australie)

reason: The image depicts a scene that is plausible for the beginning of the segregation of Aboriginals in Australia around 1788. The clothing of the colonial figure (red coat, tricorne hat) is consistent with the period. The indigenous clothing and thatched huts are also appropriate. There are no immediately obvious modern anachronisms. The overall atmosphere and lighting are consistent with the historical setting.
